name: claude-second-brain
description: A second brain for Claude Code: self-managing skills that decode intent, refuse sycophancy, link themselves into a graph, and orchestrate multi-session projects.

plugins.name: second-brain-skills
plugins.description: The full skill set of the second brain: intent decoding, anti-sycophancy judgment, skill graph linking, token economy, APA citation hunting, development paths, and the 4-phase project orchestrator (plan / execute / replan / dashboard).
